title: World Cup 2026 Causal Recap
description: Manifest index for daily Vietnamese recap files. Use history/YYYY-MM-DD.json for full daily/event data; recaps.json is legacy aggregate data.
sourcePolicy: Use official FIFA tournament information and reputable sports reporting. Update only when new matches are completed.

latest.title: Saka hat-trick earns England bronze in 10-goal thriller
